bead.title: test: migrate fakeExecuteBeadGit / fakeAgentRunner to real git + script harness
bead.description: concerns.md §testing calls out fakeExecuteBeadGit (cmd/agent_execute_bead_test.go) as legacy and mandates migration 'as the tests around them are touched'. fakeAgentRunner similarly. Both substitute git-shaped or runner-shaped fakes for the thing under test, violating 'never mock the thing you are testing'.
bead.acceptance: Tests in cmd/agent_execute_bead_test.go and cmd/agent_execute_bead_gates_test.go use newScriptHarnessRepo + real git (scrubbed-env runGitInteg). No struct ending in -GitOps or -Runner that fakes the thing under test remains.
